ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the crime incident was reported */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Exact date when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the incident occurred */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Agency reporting the crime incident */,
  "falls_within" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the crime incident occurred */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the crime incident location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the crime incident location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident location */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* LSOA code of the crime incident location */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime outcome */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "suspect_count" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved in the incident */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the incident */,
  "evidence_collected" INTEGER /* Whether evidence was collected at the scene */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lsoa_codes ("lsoa_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "agency_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "agency_website" TEXT /* Website URL for the agency */,
  "agency_contacts" TEXT /* JSON object containing contact information for key personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "is_violent" INTEGER /* Whether the crime type is violent */,
  "is_organized" INTEGER /* Whether the crime type involves organized crime */,
  "legal_statute" TEXT /* Relevant legal statute associated with the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "date_resolved" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was resolved */,
  "officer_resolved_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who resolved the incident */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_officer_resolved_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_resolved_id") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lsoa_codes" (
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* LSOA code */,
  "lsoa_name" TEXT /* LSOA name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LSOA */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the LSOA in square kilometers */,
  "geography_type" TEXT /* Type of geography (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsoa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the location */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* LSOA code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_lsoa_code FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_code") REFERENCES lsoa_codes ("lsoa_code")
)
